_index_files_found.description: Part X - Advanced Graph Algorithms (topological sort, SCC, A*, bridge-finding)
Part XI - Specialized Sorting and Techniques (counting/radix/bucket, sliding window, Kadane's)
Part XII - Advanced Topics (minimax, Mo's algorithm, convex hull)

minor_improvements.issue: Title uses ':' separator (Chapter 51: Topological Sort) while Ch 54 uses '—' (Chapter 54 - Tarjan's...). Consider unifying separator style across all chapters.
A* Go code is a pseudo-implementation stub with commented-out sections. Consider completing the A* loop with a working example (grid-based pathfinding).
Title separator inconsistency (uses '—' instead of ':' like other Part X chapters).
Minimax Go code uses a Board interface but lacks a concrete board implementation. Consider adding a Tic-Tac-Toe example for a runnable demo.
Mo's algorithm add/remove functions are stubs. Consider completing with a concrete query example (e.g., distinct elements in range).
